title: BLD Stock Earnings: TopBuild Misses EPS, Misses Revenue for Q2 2024
text: Earnings Per Share (EPS): $5.42. Analyst Estimate: $5.69. Result: Missed expectations. Revenue: $1.37 billion. Analyst Estimate: $1.40 billion. Result: Missed by 2.43%. Summary: TopBuild underperformed analyst expectations in both key metrics during the second quarter of 2024. The company fell short on earnings per share and generated lower revenue than anticipated, indicating weaker-than-expected financial performance for the period.
